caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair styled in a bun wears a black t-shirt and black over-the-ear headphones while sitting in a studio. She is positioned in profile, looking toward the left of the frame. In front of her is a professional black microphone. Behind her is a white wall with a yellow vertical stripe. To her left, a screen displays the red text "Johnson". Logos appearing on the screen and wall include "BOSS TALK 101" in red and black, and a circular "PODCAST" logo. Small text reads "Employees Only" near the top of the screen and "By: 11 logo Studio" under the "BOSS TALK 101" text. Across the sequence of frames, the woman remains stationary and maintains her focused expression, with only minimal movements in her gaze and posture.
